zipfile/ZipFile/testzip.name: testzip
zipfile/ZipFile/testzip.description: Read all the files in the archive and check their CRC’s and file headers. Return the name of the first bad file, or else return None. Changed in version 3.6: Calling testzip() on a closed ZipFile will raise a ValueError. Previously, a RuntimeError was raised.
